type_definitions.name: MainScopeName
type_definitions.description: Existing domain value object (validated non-empty ASCII scope name, rejecting the reserved "other"). Declared with action=reference to document that this track's briefing_file_for_scope accessor dispatches on ScopeName::Main(MainScopeName) → Option<&str>. The type itself is not modified; reference declaration keeps the domain catalogue non-empty per Stage 2 TDDD verification requirement without altering the baseline.

type_definitions.name: ReviewScopeConfig
type_definitions.description: Domain value object for per-scope classification + briefing lookup. T001 changes its internal shape (inner HashMap switches from Vec<GlobMatcher> to the crate-private ScopeEntry struct so each scope can carry an optional briefing_file path) and widens the public API with briefing_file_for_scope(&ScopeName) -> Option<&str>. The constructor ::new also moves to a 3-tuple entries form (name, patterns, briefing_file) and applies expand_track_id to group patterns. No I/O is added — path validation and content fetch remain outside the domain (ADR 2026-04-18-1354 §D4).
